assertions.assertion: Operational store or token cleanup is configured with EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800
assertions.rationale: While EnableTokenCleanup is known, getting the exact TokenCleanupInterval in seconds (1800) requires knowledge of the unit.

assertions.assertion: RemoveConsumedTokens is set to true and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay is set to 300
assertions.rationale: RemoveConsumedTokens and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay are Duende-specific options.
